summary: Kenneth Suna demonstrates his weekly covered call strategy generating ~$1,000/week on a $32,853 portfolio (3% weekly return). He shares specific positions, premium collected, and key lessons learned about position sizing and avoiding over-concentration in high-risk stocks.
takeaways: Target ~3% weekly premium return on covered call positions
Avoid large position sizes (>$5,000) in high-risk/volatile stocks like QuantumCape
Reduced position size from $5,000 to $2,500 in risky names after learning from mistakes
Execute buy and sell covered calls on the same day (Monday) when possible
Accept <1% premium on positions near purchase price to maintain portfolio activity
Monitor stocks approaching purchase price to identify covered call opportunities
Nphase position size ~$7,600 generated 3.2% premium in one week

strategy_candidates.change: Enforce maximum position size cap of $2,500-$3,700 per high-volatility stock to improve capital efficiency and reduce concentration risk
strategy_candidates.evidence: Kenneth explicitly states buying $5,000 of QuantumCape was a mistake due to excessive capital allocation, then successfully reduced Open position to $2,500 and generated $351 premium; demonstrates learning that smaller position sizes in risky names maintain better overall portfolio flexibility

title: Part 13 : 8/25: Can I Make $180 Per Week? #shorts
